/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX15.5.sdk -mmacosx-version-min=15.3 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/object_store_write_demo.dir/src/object_store_write_demo.cpp.o -o object_store_write_demo  libkv_store.a
